---
title: ""
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: false

---
Page last updated: `r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`

```{r setup, echo=FALSE}
# source the global R script
source("_site.R")
```

# One Ring to rule them all, One Ring to find them,
# One Ring to bring them all and in the darkness bind them
